message:
fix: resolve consistency-test magic numbers and unguarded join (#3776) (#3784)

- Extract COPY_FEEDBACK_MS constant in PreflightFailure.tsx (was bare 2000)
- Extract WS_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS constant in UpgradeStatus.tsx (was bare 5000)
- Add nullish coalescing guard on clustersWithoutEtcd.join() in EtcdStatus.tsx
